case_title: PETITIONER SURE AIR, LTD vs. KOLONAKI, INC

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF PETITIONER SURE AIR, LTD AS TO DEFENDANT KOLONAKI, INC
